consent.title: We use cookies
consent.description: We use cookies and similar technologies for analytics and advertising. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies as described in our Privacy Policy.

affiliate.disclosure: This page may contain affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

meta.homeTitle: Things To Do in Canada | MyActivity.ca
meta.homeDescription: Discover the best activities, attractions, and events across Canada. Find things to do in Toronto, Montreal, Vancouver, Calgary and more.
meta.cityDescription: Discover the best things to do in {city}, Canada. Find indoor activities, outdoor adventures, free events, museums, and more.
meta.categoryCityDescription: The best {category} in {city}, Canada. Curated activities and attractions for locals and visitors.
meta.seasonalDescription: The best {season} activities in {city}, Canada. Discover what to do this {season}.

about.title: About MyActivity.ca
about.heading: Your Guide to the Best Things To Do in Canada
about.description: MyActivity.ca is a bilingual Canadian directory of the best activities, attractions, and events — from coast to coast.
about.mission: Our mission is to help Canadians and visitors discover unforgettable experiences in every city, every season.

contact.title: Contact Us | MyActivity.ca
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a suggestion, want to list your activity, or need to report an issue? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Your guide to the best things to do across Canada.
